scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend,admin -c green,cyan,magenta "npm --prefix backend run start:dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend-admin run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix frontend-admin install
scripts.build:all: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix frontend-admin run build
scripts.setup:server: npm run install:all && npm run prisma:generate && npm run prisma:migrate:deploy && npm run build:all
scripts.server:deploy: npm run setup:server && npm run services:start && npm run services:save
scripts.server:update: npm run build:all && npm run services:reload && npm run services:save
